phrases.intent_en: Ask what days the market takes place
phrases.text_local: Quels jours le marché a-t-il lieu ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel ZHOOR luh mar-SHAY ah-TEEL lyuh
phrases.cultural_note: The main market in Amboise takes place on Friday and Sunday mornings along the banks of the Loire, selling local produce, charcuterie, and regional specialities.

responses.phonetic: luh vahn-druh-DEE ay luh dee-MAHNSH mah-TEHN
responses.local: Le vendredi et le dimanche matin.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where I can find local goat cheese
phrases.text_local: Où puis-je trouver du fromage de chèvre local ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo PWEE-zhuh troo-VAY doo froh-MAZH duh SHEV-ruh loh-KAL
phrases.cultural_note: Touraine goat cheeses such as Sainte-Maure de Touraine (AOC) are a speciality of the region and widely available at the market.

responses.english: At the back of the market, on the left.
responses.phonetic: oh FOHN doo mar-SHAY, soor lah GOHSH
responses.local: Au fond du marché, sur la gauche.

phrases.intent_en: Ask for the price of a kilo of strawberries
phrases.text_local: Quel est le prix du kilo de fraises ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel ay luh PREE doo KEE-loh duh FREZ
phrases.cultural_note: Strawberries from the Loire Valley, especially the Mara des Bois variety, are a seasonal highlight at markets from May through July.

phrases.intent_en: Ask a vendor if I can taste before buying
phrases.text_local: Est-ce que je peux goûter avant d'acheter ?
phrases.pronunciation: es-kuh zhuh PUH goo-TAY ah-VAHN dah-shuh-TAY
phrases.cultural_note: Tasting before buying is common and expected at French produce markets. Vendors are usually happy to offer samples.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the vendor accepts card payment
phrases.text_local: Acceptez-vous le paiement par carte bancaire ?
phrases.pronunciation: ak-sep-TAY-voo luh pay-MAHN par KART ban-KAIR
phrases.cultural_note: Many market stalls in smaller French towns still prefer cash. It is wise to have some euros available when visiting a marché.

responses.phonetic: wee, ah par-TEER duh deez uh-ROH
responses.local: Oui, à partir de dix euros.
